message:
fix(pid): slow-decay hysteresis steps one level at a time instead of jumping to raw

The refactored classify_with_hysteresis had a bug where the slow-decay
path (de-escalation) returned the raw pressure classification directly,
skipping intermediate levels. For example, going from Orange with 20%
free would jump directly to Green instead of stepping to Yellow first.
This violates the hysteresis invariant that de-escalation should be
gradual to prevent oscillation at boundaries.

Also fixes formatting in cli_app.rs (line wrapping for from_ref call).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
